# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"

services:
  - name: service-a
    url: http://service-a.example.com
    routes:
      - paths: ["/api/service-a"]
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
  - name: service-b
    url: http://service-b.example.com
    routes:
      - paths: ["/api/service-b"]
        methods:
          - PUT
          - DELETE
    plugins:
      - name: basic-auth

routes:
  - name: route-a
    paths: ["/api/service-a"]
    service: service-a
  - name: route-b
    paths: ["/api/service-b"]
    service: service-b

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 5
